LIVE SLICE V12 — every tile native-baked, zero overlay payloads

V12: THE BAKE IS THE WORLD. The same canonical ground V11 walked (cells (33,6)(34,6)(35,6)(36,6), seed 12345) — but every marking, wrecked car, fire barrel and dead lamp is now BAKED into the tile image by the bake factory, not painted live on top. V11 injected three overlay payloads into the walk loop; V12 has NONE. The live layers are only what moves: you, the survivors, and the sun. Walk it — you are on native-baked cells, the overlay era is over.
